nasb.text: So they shall eat of the fruit of their own way And be satiated with their own devices.

esv.text: therefore they shall eat the fruit of their way, and have their fill of their own devices.

cnv.text: 所以，他們必自食其果， 必飽嘗自己所設計謀的傷害。

ccb.text: 所以，你们必自食其果， 因自己的恶谋而吃尽苦头。

csbs.text: 所以他们将吃尽自己行为的果实， 饱尝自己计谋的后果。
